{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204104683F3C4F222F6404B975C"}"},"total":130},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614803557661049625","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得是我看洪荒中最好的一本，其他洪荒是在展示文笔，展现世界观，但这本不一样，作者不仅对洪荒有自己的理解，更令我惊叹的是他赋予了每一个角色辩证的立体感，将自己的人生理解融入了每一个角色之中，他的剧情是活的。总而言之，是一本不容错过的洪荒。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772962028,"group_id":"7606610295762455576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"宁做宇宙闲吟客，怕作乾坤窃碌人。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7s+x82G7OCCDaJcJA70w7Uc8n6+Cp7kehfqOpWWjxFo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/35c910a4dfef4da29a657954feb5813d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710544&x-signature=2wUdzmyrBLV%2FJBLMmnxkj%2BbCvs8%3D","user_id":"3584006395799604","user_name":"鹓莫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3584006395799604","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1764909132,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606610295762455576","book_info":{"abstract":"【刚出评分，后面会涨的。】
【我只能说，看了N多的洪荒文，但！我的洪荒不一样！没那么多戾气，却又那么的不同！】
普通蓝星大学生穿越洪荒，时间点在鸿钧成圣前三万年。
竟成了那个传说中“第一倒霉蛋”红云老祖？
我清楚的知道，红云的命运。
虽然鸿蒙紫气在手，成圣的诱惑近在咫尺。
但等待我的，却是鲲鹏的偷袭、冥河的暗算，以及一道身死道消、为他人作嫁衣裳的凄惨天命？
不！这一世，我拒绝天道剧本！
紫霄宫让座？让了，但这次，我让的不是准提接引！
鸿蒙紫气？要了，但这次，我却转手送人！
接引、准提，对不住了。
西方地脉我来修！
西方灵宝我来拿！
西方徒弟我来收！
西方教主我来做！
你们未来那“普度众生”的佛门，我先笑纳了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5be3f20e78a14daedb38f48c5db6bba0","author":"浮游梦千秋","author_id":"","book_id":"7606610295762455576","book_name":"洪荒：我红云抢先立佛教！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c888","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"24.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606610514734498328","read_count":"243359","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"251285"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"100","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,魂穿,洪荒,穿越,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe1da529237e5a63dcf74d3ed12d17794~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307846&x-signature=UZDvHbm0PLYzJd3QZYIL0JHpL1U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2119476298656968","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"69"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204104683F3C4F222F6404B975C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"re
